title: Approved Change — ECR-207: Wing skin material change to hybrid carbon-aramid composite
text:
Engineering Change Notice ECN-307. Implements ECR-207.
Approved by: Dr. Rhea Voss, 2023-09-05.

Authorised changes:
1. P-1008 (Wing Skin Port): Updated to Rev C. Material changed to hybrid carbon-aramid composite (CFRP weave + Kevlar® ±45° interlayer). Mass increase: +25g.
2. P-1009 (Wing Skin Starboard): Updated to Rev C. Same material change. Mass increase: +25g.
3. DOC-409 (Structural Specification): Updated to include hybrid composite material specification and bonding requirements.
4. DOC-407 (Airframe Loads Analysis): Re-run for modified stiffness characteristics of hybrid composite. Stiffness reduction of 8% vs straight CFRP confirmed acceptable against flutter margins. Tobias Wren, completed 2023-10-05.
5. DRW-502 (Wing Skin & Spar Assembly): Updated with hybrid composite layup schedule (0°/90° CFRP + ±45° aramid interlayer + 0°/90° CFRP).
6. Mass impact: +50g total. System mass margin remains at 290g (340g - 50g), per updated DOC-401.
